service_description: Platform-hosted MasterNoder2 masternodes on shared infrastructure — one chain copy, 5,000 MN2 collateral per node (daemon requirement), 50% of block rewards to the masternode tier. Fleet cap 250 slots (conservative target before multi-ping daemon v1.3).
public_notes: Reserve a slot from $4.99 — PayPal, coins, in-wallet MN2, or on-chain MN2. Provisioning is automatic (5,000 MN2 collateral lock + broadcast).

shop_payments.comment: null = derive from USD + coins_per_mn2 + live MN2/USD; override with fixed coin price per slot

paypal_monthly.label: MN2 Masternode hosting — monthly
paypal_monthly.plan_note: Use PayPal subscription plan P-PLACEHOLDER-MN-HOST from monetization_config when live.

ops.capacity_planning: 2026-06: max_hosted_nodes=250 (not 500). Full fleet needs 1,250,000 MN2 collateral + cron provision-pending. Only platformmn2 gets ENABLED activetime until daemon multi-ping ships — see docs/MN2_DAEMON_MULTI_PING_UPGRADE.md.
